summary: San Mateo County 90-day case closure performance metric by year. Columns include year and percent of cases closed within 90 days.
San Mateo County smart corridor fiber Measure K IoT project performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, overall status, comments, smart corridor fiber status, and target.

San Mateo County EMS health and medical emergency preparedness and response program exercises or disaster events performance measure. Columns include fiscal year, measure name, data type, measure value, and measure target.
San Mateo County Cordilleras Mental Health Facility replacement construction completion Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, and percent complete.
San Mateo County ISD backup appliances Measure K project performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, overall status, comments, backup appliances count, and target.

San Mateo County Skylonda Fire Station replacement construction Measure K performance data. Columns include initiative name, JL code, performance measure description, and fiscal year actuals and targets from FY 2013-14 through FY 2016-17.

American Community Survey 5-year estimates economic characteristics for San Mateo County. Columns include year, row ID, variable code, variable label, name, type, value, difference, percent change, centroid, and geometry.
San Mateo County media impressions and outreach events by month and fiscal year. Columns include fiscal year, month, media impressions, and number of outreach events.

San Mateo County 2018 census tracts with peer tract assignments GIS dataset. Columns include census tract code, name, NAMELSAD, GEOID, MTFCC, land area, water area, internal point coordinates, and peer tract identifier.
San Mateo County 8-day death certificate registration compliance rate by fiscal year. Columns include fiscal year and percent of death certificates registered within 8 days.

San Mateo County Project WeHOPE Dignity on Wheels mobile hygiene services Measure K performance data. Columns include initiative name, JL code, performance measure description, and fiscal year 2016-17 actuals and targets.
San Mateo County Zero Net Energy (ZNE) building projects performance data by fiscal year. Columns include fiscal year and percent of projects with adopted ZNE design principles.
San Mateo County Orange and Grand affordable housing construction Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, and percent of project completed.
San Mateo County youth climate science program participation by low-income students by year. Columns include year and percent of participating students representing low-income communities.
San Mateo County Safe Harbor Shelter repairs Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, and percent of project completed.
San Mateo County housing inspection violations from 2021 to 2025. Columns include year and total violations per inspection.

San Mateo County fiscal year 2021-2026 five-year capital improvement plan project budgets. Columns include project name, category, carryforward balance, recommended budget, other revisions, adopted budget, and proposed project budgets by fiscal year through 2025-26.
San Mateo County number of datasets published on the open data portal over time. Columns include date and number of datasets published.
San Mateo County housing inspection violations from 2021 to 2023. Columns include year and total violations per inspection.
San Mateo County cost per investigation by year. Columns include year and cost per investigation.
San Mateo County housing inspection violations from 2021 to 2023 (second dataset). Columns include year and total violations per inspection.
San Mateo County mental health penetration rate performance measure for FY 2022-23. Columns include performance measure, FY 2022-23 actual, statewide benchmark, and like-size counties benchmark.

San Mateo County alcohol and other drug (AOD) penetration rate performance measure for FY 2022-23. Columns include performance measure, FY 2022-23 actual, statewide benchmark, and like-size counties benchmark.

San Mateo County youth mental health penetration rate performance measure for FY 2022-23. Columns include performance measure, FY 2022-23 actual, statewide benchmark, and like-size counties benchmark.
San Mateo County unincorporated area greenhouse gas emissions inventory with reduction targets. Columns include inventory year, greenhouse gas emissions in metric tons, and target.

San Mateo County percent of building permits created online performance measure. Columns include program name, measure ID, priority measure, measure target, on-track status, target met, budget book, measure type, data type, and benchmark value.
San Mateo County building energy emissions data through August 2025. Columns include inventory year, electricity emissions, and methane gas emissions.
San Mateo County WIC breastfeeding rates at six months by race for FY 2023-24. Columns include fiscal year, measure name, data type, measure value, measure target, and benchmark value.
San Mateo County housing inspection violations from FY 2020-21 through FY 2025-26. Columns include year and total violations per inspection.
San Mateo County emergency medical services response time compliance performance data. Columns include year, year-end actual, and target.
San Mateo County EMS small board and healthcare coalition reports using ReddiNet platform. Columns include fiscal year, year-end actuals, and target.
San Mateo County housing inspection violations from FY 2020-21 through FY 2024-25. Columns include year and total violations per inspection.

San Mateo County percent of violent cases referred to the District Attorney's Office mid-year data for FY 2024-25. Columns include jurisdiction, fiscal year actuals for FY 2022-23 through FY 2024-25, person in poverty, and unnamed columns.
San Mateo County elder abuse cases referred to the District Attorney's Office by age group for FY 2023-24. Columns include year and case counts for age groups 65-70, 71-74, 75-80, and 80+ years.
San Mateo County housing inspection violations from 2021 to 2028 projection. Columns include year and total violations per inspection.
San Mateo County housing inspection violations from 2021 to 2025. Columns include year and total violations per inspection.
San Mateo County Office of Community Affairs outreach events performance metrics. Columns include metric name, FY 2023-24 actuals, FY 2024-25 actuals, and target.
San Mateo County housing inspection violations from FY 2021-22 through FY 2025-26. Columns include year and total violations per inspection.
San Mateo County elder abuse cases for FY 2025-26 mid-year by age group. Columns include year and case counts for age groups 65-70, 71-74, 75-80, 80+, and total.
